name: hb_1_8
requirements: As part of your analysis, for East Sewage Treatment Plant station over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: mean_o3, max_o3 (float), o3_exceedance_hours (O3>160, int).

turns.query: Analyze ozone formation patterns at air quality station: East Sewage Treatment Plant during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
